# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / build / packaging
- [ ] Native C++ / N-API
- [ ] Security-sensitive change
- [ ] Dependency / license / compliance change
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Platform Impact

- [ ] HarmonyOS
- [ ] OpenHarmony
- [ ] arm64-v8a
- [ ] x86_64
- [ ] Not platform-specific

## Testing

Describe what was tested.

- [ ] Local build
- [ ] GitHub Actions build
- [ ] HAP artifact inspected
- [ ] Installed on device or emulator
- [ ] SSH connection tested with redacted/non-sensitive target
- [ ] SFTP tested with redacted/non-sensitive target
- [ ] Not tested; reason explained below

## Security and Privacy Checklist

- [ ] No passwords, tokens, SSH private keys, certificates, keystores, or secrets are included.
- [ ] No proprietary SDK archives or extracted SDK files are included.
- [ ] Logs and screenshots are redacted.
- [ ] Code does not log credentials, private keys, tokens, full connection profiles, or sensitive host data.
- [ ] Host-key verification or credential-handling changes were reviewed carefully, if applicable.

## License and Compliance Checklist

- [ ] No third-party dependency was added or changed.
- [ ] If third-party dependencies were added or changed, `THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md` was updated.
- [ ] Third-party copyright and license notices were preserved.
- [ ] The change does not imply official Huawei, HarmonyOS, OpenHarmony, OpenSSH, SSH, or libssh2 endorsement.
- [ ] Release artifacts do not include SDKs, signing materials, or unrelated binaries.

## Notes for Reviewers

Add anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
